report.summary: Community growth cycle v29: BTC $73.9K rally from Extreme Fear contrarian campaign (DCA calculator CTA) + Venus Protocol $3.7M exploit security thread + FHE Crypto deep-dive + AI Agent Payments x402 thread; weekly newsletter draft for Apr 10; 2 engagement posts for Apr 11; calendar filled Mon-Sun Apr 7-13; 2 new social cards created (venus-exploit, btc-extreme-fear-rally).

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Twitter thread (Mon Apr 7 AM, 5 posts): BTC Rally from Extreme Fear — '$73,882 while Fear & Greed sits at 23'; contrarian DCA angle, $700M ETF inflows, institutional accumulation vs retail panic; CTA to /tools/dca-calculator + /learn/dca-strategy-guide
Tweet (Mon Apr 7 AM): Market rally single — BTC $73.9K, $700M ETF inflows, 'be greedy when others are fearful' framing

Twitter thread (Tue Apr 8 AM, 6 posts): Venus Protocol $3.7M Exploit — 9-month setup, 84% supply cap capture, $THE price manipulation +114%, flash loan drain of BTC+CAKE+BNB; protection checklist; CTA to /learn/defi-safety-guide-2026
Tweet (Tue Apr 8 AM): DeFi security single — Venus exploit summary + security checklist + guide CTA

Twitter thread (Wed Apr 9 AM, 5 posts): FHE Crypto — fully homomorphic encryption explained, private DeFi, sealed-bid auctions, confidential AI; Zama/Fhenix/Inco Network; CTA to /learn/fhe-crypto-guide-2026
Tweet (Wed Apr 9 AM): FHE single — compute on encrypted data, no MEV, no front-running

Newsletter (Thu Apr 10): Weekly edition — Venus exploit security alert, BTC rally from Extreme Fear, FHE guide, AI Agent x402 guide, DCA tool CTA, Glamsterdam upgrade mention, Degen Corner on flash loan game theory
Tweet (Fri Apr 11 AM): DeFi security poll — 'After Venus $3.7M exploit, what do you check first before depositing?' (Audits/TVL/Team/Insurance)
Tweet (Fri Apr 11 PM): Contrarian investing discussion — '$700M ETF inflows while Fear & Greed at 23' + best answers in newsletter
Twitter thread (Sat Apr 12 AM, 5 posts): AI Agent Payments x402 — machine-to-machine micropayments over HTTP, why crypto is the payment rail for AI; CTA to /learn/ai-agent-payments-x402-guide
Tweet (Sat Apr 12 AM): AI Agent Payments single — x402 protocol flow
Tweet (Sun Apr 13 AM): Weekly market wrap — BTC, ETH, Venus exploit, ETF inflows, Glamsterdam

sections.title: Visual Assets Created
items: social-venus-exploit-defi-security.svg — 1200x630 social card: dark theme with red security alert gradient; 'SECURITY ALERT' badge with pulsing red dot; title 'Venus Protocol Exploited — $3.7M Flash Loan Attack'; 4 stat cards (Stolen $3.7M, Supply Cap 84%, Price Pump +114%, Setup Time 9 months); 5-step attack flow visualization (Accumulate → Bypass → Pump → Borrow → Drain); paused market tags (THE, BCH, LTC, UNI, AAVE); CTA to defi-safety-guide. Saved to /public/social-venus-exploit-defi-security.svg

social-btc-extreme-fear-rally.svg — 1200x630 social card: dark theme with green rally gradient; 'MARKET RALLY' badge; title 'BTC Rallies to $73.9K From Extreme Fear'; left glass card with BTC $73,882 (+4%), ETH $2,182 (+4.5%), Total $2.6T (+3.5%); center Fear & Greed gauge at 23 (Extreme Fear) with visual bar; right card $700M BTC ETF inflows + Strategy 1M BTC target; top gainers row (ETH +7.6%, SOL +6.1%, ZEC +8.2%, XRP +4.5%, ZRO +9.8%); Buffett quote. Saved to /public/social-btc-extreme-fear-rally.svg

sections.title: Analytics Context
items: BTC Rally from Extreme Fear (Mon Apr 7): BTC $73,882 (+4%), ETH $2,182 (+4.5%), total market $2.6T (+3.5%). Fear & Greed at 23 (Extreme Fear) — strongest contrarian signal in weeks. $700M into BTC ETFs in March. Strategy targeting 1M BTC. DCA calculator is degen0x's highest-traffic tool — this is the ideal content hook.

Venus Protocol Exploit (Tue Apr 8): $3.7M flash loan attack on BNB Chain via THENA ($THE) supply cap manipulation. 9-month patient setup. Markets paused (THE, BCH, LTC, UNI, AAVE, FIL, TWT). Breaking DeFi security news drives highest engagement rates. Links to existing defi-safety-guide-2026 (already published, strong SEO foundation).

FHE Crypto (Wed Apr 9): Publish queue page. Fully homomorphic encryption is an emerging narrative with very low content competition. Privacy + MEV protection resonates with DeFi-active audience. Zama, Fhenix, Inco Network are actively building. Educational thread for mid-week.

AI Agent Payments x402 (Sat Apr 12): Publish queue page. AI + crypto is the dominant narrative of 2026. x402 is a novel protocol enabling machine-to-machine micropayments — zero social coverage from competitors. Weekend educational content gets highest save/bookmark rate.

Newsletter (Thu Apr 10): Venus exploit security alert creates urgency-driven opens. Consolidates BTC rally, FHE guide, x402 guide, tax countdown (13 days), Glamsterdam upgrade. Degen Corner on flash loan game theory (audits check code, not assumptions).

Community Engagement (Fri Apr 11): Venus exploit creates natural security discussion hook. Poll feeds product decisions on security features. Contrarian investing discussion drives replies (high engagement signal for Twitter algorithm).
347 pages published, 2 in queue (fhe-crypto-guide-2026, ai-agent-payments-x402-guide). Calendar filled Mon-Sun Apr 7-13. No posting conflicts with v28 (ends Sun Apr 6).
Social drafts saved to /reports/community-drafts/2026-03-16-social-drafts-v29.md
